hero.description: I build modern interfaces, scalable APIs and web systems focused on performance, usability and clean architecture.

architecture.title: Architecture
architecture.sub: Layered view — from UI to deploy — with clear contracts between each step.

about.title: Product-minded software engineer
about.lead: I work at the intersection of UX and backend engineering: clear API contracts, predictable frontends and reliable deploys. Readable tests where they matter and documentation that ages well.
about.para: I value continuous feedback, metrics (Core Web Vitals, p99 latency, error rates) and a culture where refactoring is an investment — not a luxury.

timeline.title: Strong CS & web foundations
timeline.body: Algorithms, networking and engineering practices applied to real products.

timeline.title: Iterative delivery
timeline.body: End-to-end apps with reviewable code, performance metrics and documented decisions.

timeline.title: Squads at scale
timeline.body: Collaboration with design and product, architecture reviews and focus on DX.

timeline.title: What’s next
timeline.body: Even more observable distributed systems and blazing-fast interfaces for end users.
